case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ALICE DANIELHOGANSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100064886) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELHOGANSON, ALICE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-08-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
